2606.32038.title: Introspective Coupling: Self-Explanation Training Tracks Behavioral Change Despite Fixed Supervision
2606.32038.paper_summary: When does training language models (LMs) to generate explanations of their predictions yield faithful introspection, rather than superficial imitation? We study LMs trained to explain which features of their inputs influenced their behavior, using models' counterfactual behavior on modified inputs as supervision. Surprisingly, we find that LMs trained on fixed counterfactual explanations derived from earlier checkpoints of themselves, or even from behaviorally similar models in different families, frequently produce explanations more faithful to their own current behaviors than to those of their training targets. This "introspective" coupling between LM explanations and behaviors occurs when training explanations remain sufficiently correlated with current behaviors over the course of training, even as behaviors themselves shift. We also show that introspective coupling tracks behavior shifts: when explanation training is provided concurrently with other post-training objectives, explanations track those shifts without requiring updated supervision. This phenomenon appears in multiple tasks, including sycophancy and refusal, and is robust to label noise. Overall, our results show that even fixed datasets of counterfactual explanations can provide scalable and generalizable post-training signal for introspection.
2606.32038.paper_summary_zh: 當訓練語言模型 (LMs) 以生成其預測解釋時，何時能夠產生真實的內省，而非表面的模仿？我們研究了訓練 LMs 以解釋其輸入的哪些特徵影響了其行為，並使用模型在修改輸入上的反事實行為作為監督。令人驚訝的是，我們發現訓練於固定反事實解釋的 LMs，這些解釋源自於它們早期的檢查點，甚至來自於行為上相似的不同家族模型，經常產生比其訓練目標更忠實於自己當前行為的解釋。當訓練解釋在訓練過程中與當前行為保持足夠的相關性時，這種 LM 解釋和行為之間的「內省」耦合就會發生，即使行為本身發生變化。我們還顯示，內省耦合能夠追蹤行為的變化：當解釋訓練與其他後訓練目標同時提供時，解釋能夠追蹤這些變化，而不需要更新的監督。這一現象出現在多個任務中，包括諂媚和拒絕，並且對標籤噪聲具有穩健性。總體而言，我們的結果顯示，即使是固定的反事實解釋數據集也能為內省提供可擴展和可泛化的後訓練信號。
2606.32038.author: Zifan Carl Guo et.al.
2606.32038.authors: Zifan Carl Guo, Laura Ruis, Jacob Andreas, Belinda Z. Li
